project.name: Overvibing - Professional Mobile Enhancement
project.description: Comprehensive backlog for professional mobile enhancements to the Overvibing 3D galaxy visualization project

epics.title: Performance Optimizations
epics.description: Optimize 3D rendering and particle systems for mobile devices
acceptanceCriteria: Particle count scales based on device capabilities

tasks.title: Implement Device Capability Detection
tasks.description: Create system to detect device GPU capabilities and memory
acceptanceCriteria: Store detection results for optimization decisions
tasks.technicalNotes: Use WebGL extensions and memory APIs to determine device capabilities

tasks.title: Dynamic Particle Count Scaling
tasks.description: Adjust particle count based on device performance
tasks.technicalNotes: Modify generateGalaxy() function to accept dynamic particle counts

tasks.title: Mobile-Optimized Shader Complexity
tasks.description: Reduce shader complexity for mobile GPUs
tasks.technicalNotes: Create mobile-specific shader variants with reduced complexity

tasks.title: WebGL Context Optimization
tasks.description: Optimize WebGL settings for mobile performance
tasks.technicalNotes: Modify renderer initialization with mobile-optimized settings

epics.title: Enhanced Mobile UX
epics.description: Improve user experience with advanced mobile interactions
acceptanceCriteria: Intuitive gesture controls for galaxy interaction

tasks.title: Gesture Controls Implementation
tasks.description: Add touch gestures for galaxy rotation, zoom, and pan
tasks.technicalNotes: Extend OrbitControls with custom touch handling

tasks.title: Haptic Feedback Integration
tasks.description: Add haptic feedback for button interactions
tasks.technicalNotes: Use Vibration API with feature detection

tasks.title: Enhanced Touch Targets
tasks.description: Improve touch target sizes and spacing for mobile
tasks.technicalNotes: Update CSS with mobile-optimized touch targets

tasks.title: Loading States and Transitions
tasks.description: Add smooth loading states and micro-animations
tasks.technicalNotes: Implement CSS animations and loading state management

epics.title: Advanced Mobile Features
epics.description: Implement advanced mobile-specific features and PWA capabilities
acceptanceCriteria: Full PWA capabilities with offline functionality
Better error handling for mobile networks

tasks.title: PWA Enhancement
tasks.description: Complete PWA implementation with offline capabilities
tasks.technicalNotes: Implement service worker with cache-first strategy

tasks.title: Mobile-Specific Animations
tasks.description: Add micro-interactions and animations optimized for mobile
tasks.technicalNotes: Use CSS transforms and requestAnimationFrame for smooth animations

tasks.title: Network Error Handling
tasks.description: Improve error handling for mobile network conditions
tasks.technicalNotes: Implement network status monitoring and retry logic

tasks.title: Enhanced Accessibility
tasks.technicalNotes: Add ARIA labels, semantic HTML, and accessibility testing

epics.title: Professional Polish
epics.description: Add final professional touches and optimizations
acceptanceCriteria: Smooth 60fps animations on all mobile devices
Better contrast ratios for mobile screens

tasks.title: Animation Performance Optimization
tasks.description: Ensure smooth 60fps animations on mobile devices
acceptanceCriteria: Reduced animation complexity on low-end devices
tasks.technicalNotes: Use CSS will-change and transform3d for hardware acceleration

tasks.title: Font Loading Optimization
tasks.description: Optimize font loading and rendering for mobile
tasks.technicalNotes: Implement font-display: swap and preload critical fonts

tasks.title: Visual Hierarchy Enhancement
tasks.description: Improve visual hierarchy and spacing for mobile
tasks.technicalNotes: Update CSS with improved contrast and spacing variables

tasks.title: Cross-Device Testing
tasks.description: Comprehensive testing across different mobile devices
tasks.technicalNotes: Use browser dev tools and real device testing

notes.currentStatus: The mobile version is already professional-grade with consistent button sizing, proper responsive breakpoints, and touch-friendly interactions. These enhancements will elevate it to enterprise-level quality.
priorityOrder: EPIC-001: Performance Optimizations (Critical for user experience)
EPIC-002: Enhanced Mobile UX (High impact on user satisfaction)
EPIC-003: Advanced Mobile Features (Medium impact, nice-to-have)
EPIC-004: Professional Polish (Final touches and optimization)
technicalConsiderations: Maintain backward compatibility with existing features
Ensure all enhancements work across different mobile browsers
Consider battery usage impact of new features
Maintain the existing design system consistency
